steps.script: (html) => { try { const iframe = document.querySelector('main iframe'); if (iframe && iframe.contentDocument && iframe.contentDocument.body) { const body = iframe.contentDocument.body; body.focus(); body.innerHTML = html; body.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); try { body.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, data: html, inputType: 'insertFromPaste' })); } catch (e) { body.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); } body.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return { success: true, method: 'new_iframe', length: html.length }; } return { success: false, error: 'iframe not found' }; } catch (e) { return { success: false, error: e.message }; } }

() => { const iframe = document.querySelector('main iframe'); if (!iframe || !iframe.contentDocument || !iframe.contentDocument.body) return { success: false }; const body = iframe.contentDocument.body; body.focus(); const ev = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { bubbles: true, key: ' ', code: 'Space' }); body.dispatchEvent(ev); body.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur', { bubbles: true })); return { success: true }; }

() => { const names = ['学习和成长']; const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const findByName = (name) => document.querySelector('[class*="tabs__item"][title="' + name + '"]') || document.querySelector('[class*="tab-item"][title="' + name + '"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div, span, li, button, a')).find(el => norm(el.textContent) === name); for (const name of names) { const el = findByName(name); if (el) { el.click(); return { picked: name, fallback: false }; } } const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*="tabs__item"], [class*="tab-item"], .tag-tabs *, .tag-modal *')).filter(el => norm(el.textContent).length > 0); if (candidates[0]) { candidates[0].click(); return { picked: norm(candidates[0].textContent), fallback: true }; } return { picked: null, fallback: true }; }

() => { const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const selected = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*="active"], [class*="selected"], [class*="checked"]')).map(el => norm(el.textContent)).filter(Boolean); if (selected.length > 0) return { ok: true, selected }; const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*="tag"], .tag-item, .tag-modal span, .tag-modal div')).filter(el => norm(el.textContent).length > 0); if (candidates[0]) { candidates[0].click(); return { ok: false, fallback: true, picked: norm(candidates[0].textContent) }; } return { ok: false, fallback: true, picked: null }; }

() => { const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const selected = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*="active"], [class*="selected"], [class*="checked"]')).map(el => norm(el.textContent)).filter(Boolean); if (selected.length > 0) return { ok: true, selected }; const main = ['学习和成长']; const sub = ['职场和发展', '学习方法']; const findByName = (name) => document.querySelector('[class*="tabs__item"][title="' + name + '"]') || document.querySelector('[class*="tab-item"][title="' + name + '"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div, span, li, button, a')).find(el => norm(el.textContent) === name); for (const name of main) { const el = findByName(name); if (el) { el.click(); break; } } let clicked = 0; for (const name of sub) { const el = document.querySelector('[class*="tag"][title="' + name + '"]') || document.querySelector('.tag-item[title="' + name + '"]') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('span, div, label, a, li')).find(e => norm(e.textContent) === name); if (el) { el.click(); clicked++; } } if (clicked === 0) { const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*="tag"], .tag-item, .tag-modal span, .tag-modal div')).filter(el => norm(el.textContent).length > 0); if (candidates[0]) { candidates[0].click(); clicked = 1; } } return { ok: clicked > 0 }; }

() => new Promise(resolve => { const deadline = Date.now() + 12000; const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const check = () => { const textarea = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder*="摘要"], textarea[placeholder*="文章摘要"]'); if (textarea && textarea.value && textarea.value.trim().length > 0) return resolve({ ok: true, method: 'textarea' }); const editable = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[contenteditable="true"]')).find(el => { const ph = norm(el.getAttribute('placeholder') || el.getAttribute('data-placeholder') || ''); return ph.includes('摘要') || ph.includes('文章摘要'); }); if (editable && norm(editable.textContent).length > 0) return resolve({ ok: true, method: 'contenteditable' }); if (Date.now() > deadline) return resolve({ ok: false }); setTimeout(check, 500); }; check(); })

() => { const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const textarea = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder*="摘要"], textarea[placeholder*="文章摘要"]'); if (textarea && textarea.value && textarea.value.trim().length > 0) return { ok: true, already: true }; const editable = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[contenteditable="true"]')).find(el => { const ph = norm(el.getAttribute('placeholder') || el.getAttribute('data-placeholder') || ''); return ph.includes('摘要') || ph.includes('文章摘要'); }); if (editable && norm(editable.textContent).length > 0) return { ok: true, already: true }; const btn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], a, span')).find(el => /AI提取摘要|生成摘要|重新生成/.test(norm(el.textContent || ''))); if (btn) { btn.click(); return { ok: false, clicked: true }; } return { ok: false, clicked: false }; }

steps.regex: AI提取摘要|生成摘要|重新生成
